Name: Cloud Governance: An AWS IAM Case Study
Tl;dr: Exploring the strategic power of Identity and Access Management through a practical AWS case study.
Description: Governance Risk and Compliance (GRC) is often the hidden gem of cybersecurity. This case study explores how AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) serves as a cornerstone for robust cloud governance.

Name: Predicting Fraudsters: A DoorDash Case Study
Tl;dr: How machine learning transforms fraud detection from manual chats into scalable real-time automated decisions.
Description: For high-volume platforms like DoorDash manual intervention for every refund request is impossible. This is where machine learning bridges the gap between theoretical prediction and practical scalable solutions.

Name: The Secret Language of Secure APIs: JWE and JWS
Tl;dr: A deep dive into the cryptographic pillars of API security: understanding the CIA Triad and the technical distinction between JSON Web Signatures and Encryption.
Description: Understanding how Confidentiality Integrity and Authentication interact is essential for any engineer designing robust systems. This article explores JWS and JWE standards.

Name: Everything You Should Know About Mutual TLS
Tl;dr: A comprehensive guide to understanding Public Key Infrastructure (PKI) the mechanics of TLS handshakes and the robust security of Mutual TLS (mTLS).
Description: Mutual TLS takes standard security a step further. It's like a high-security building where both parties must prove their identity before communication begins.

Name: What is Tokenization and Why Should You Care?
Tl;dr: A deep dive into how tokenization secures sensitive data like PII and credit cards by replacing value with placeholders.
Description: Tokenization is a cornerstone of modern data security. Unlike encryption it replaces sensitive data with a valueless placeholder essential for securing payments and protecting personal info.

Name: The Modern Playbook for Data Protection: Lessons from PCI DSS v4.0
Tl;dr: Moving beyond the compliance checklist to a risk-based proactive strategy for protecting data at rest in transit and across APIs.
Description: PCI DSS v4.0 marks a fundamental shift from reactive compliance to a proactive outcome-focused philosophy for cloud-native and API-driven environments.

Name: A Practical GDPR Playbook for Engineers
Tl;dr: Translating the GDPR maze into a system design problem: roles encryption and telemetry for the modern developer.
Description: Most engineering teams treat GDPR like a compliance ritual. However at its core the regulation is a system design problem that can be solved with encryption pipelines and logging.

Name: Jargon-Free Guide to Security Compliance
Tl;dr: Untangling the alphabet soup of PCI GDPR and HIPAA to understand the blueprint for your organization's digital house.
Description: Security compliance often feels like an exclusive club with a secret language. But strip away the acronyms and it's actually quite simple: Compliance is just a set of building codes for your digital house.

Name: Practical Guide to ISO 27001:2022 Certification and Beyond
Tl;dr: A structured roadmap to navigating the gold standard of information security management without getting lost in technical jargon.
Description: ISO/IEC 27001:2022 is the international gold standard for managing information security risks through an Information Security Management System (ISMS).

Name: SOC Reports Demystified: Types Criteria and Audit Roadmap
Tl;dr: A comprehensive guide to understanding SOC audit reports from the Trust Services Criteria to navigating the journey from Type 1 to Type 2.
Description: SOC reports unlock enterprise deals and reassure customers that security is a business priority. This guide explains the types criteria and audit roadmap.

Name: My Take on Matt Pocock's Talk: Why Software Fundamentals Matter More Than Ever
Tl;dr: A reflection on the enduring importance of clean design deep modules and testability in the age of AI-driven development.
Description: AI isn't a paradigm shift that makes engineering obsolete; it is a tool that amplifies your existing engineering practices—for better or worse.

Name: Veeto
Tl;dr: A powerful encryption and decryption service designed to streamline cryptographic operations for Visa and Mastercard payment workflows using JWE standards.
Description: Veeto is a specialized encryption and decryption service designed to streamline cryptographic operations for Visa and Mastercard payment workflows.

Name: InCharted API
Tl;dr: A high-performance REST API for real-time programmatic data visualization offering 11+ chart types and multi-format exports for developers and SaaS platforms.
Description: InCharted is a robust API solution built to eliminate the friction of generating professional-grade charts programmatically.

Name: SecOraPrep
Tl;dr: A high-end cybersecurity certification platform focused on advanced GRC SOC and Security Engineering training through hands-on labs and AI mentorship.
Description: SecOraPrep is an elite certification preparation and exam voucher platform bridging the gap between theory and practice.

Name: SecOraPrep Affiliate
Tl;dr: A specialized affiliate management platform designed to scale the SecOraPrep ecosystem through real-time analytics and automated partner workflows.
Description: SecOraPrep Affiliate is the dedicated management engine powering the referral ecosystem for the SecOraPrep cybersecurity platform.
